description_long: This is a small, single-propeller airplane with a streamlined metallic fuselage and a classic design reminiscent of mid-20th-century aircraft. The wings are straight and low-mounted, with a slight dihedral angle, and the wingtips are rounded. The nose features a prominent red spinner and a single piston engine with a visible propeller. The cockpit is positioned forward on the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, with a clear canopy. The tail section has a conventional layout with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The landing gear is fixed and consists of two main wheels and a small tail wheel, indicating a taildragger configuration.
description: A small, metallic, single-propeller airplane with low-mounted straight wings, a red nose spinner, and a classic taildragger landing gear. The cockpit is forward and enclosed with a clear canopy.
description_view_0: Side view showing the streamlined metallic fuselage, red nose spinner, and low-mounted wings with visible landing gear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the red propeller spinner, straight wings with slight dihedral, and the forward cockpit canopy.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the taildragger landing gear, single vertical stabilizer, and the overall compact shape.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail section with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, as well as the fixed main and tail wheels.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings and rounded tips, slight dihedral angle, no winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single clear canopy, likely single-seat.
